Bring a modern update to conventional order management

Manage online food orders from Swiggy, Zomato, Dunzo in a single dashboard, increase restaurant sales with actionable insights, automate menu & pricing updates easily.

Start for Free

Product Video

See Foaps in action

How it works

How Foaps helps you run your restaurant better

Order Management

Manage online food orders, all from a single point

Receive and manage all your online food orders from Swiggy, Zomato, Dunzo and more in a unified dashboard. No more switching between apps or missing orders.

Menu Management

Bring updates across delivery platforms instantly

Automate your menu and pricing updates via Foaps and eliminate the need to update on each delivery platform manually. Revise your pricing, modify the menu and confirm the availability of items by just updating on Foaps alone.

Usability

Collaborate smoothly with multiple delivery partners

Foaps integrates seamlessly with all major food delivery platforms, making it easy to coordinate across Swiggy, Zomato, Dunzo, and more from one place.

Actionable Insights

Draw decisive conclusions from actionable insights

Identify the best performing fields, the areas that need attention, the potential areas of improvement and find productive insights to grow your business via our comprehensive, in-depth reports.

Receive orders from your food delivery apps

Connect Foaps with the food delivery apps you use at your restaurants.

Features

Features that are innovative, powerful and most wanted for your restaurant!

Order Management

Receive all your food delivery orders in one place. Accept, reject, and track orders from Swiggy, Zomato, Dunzo and other platforms without switching between apps.

Read More

Menu Management

Automate your menu and pricing updates via Foaps and eliminate the need to update on each delivery platform manually. Revise your pricing, modify the menu and confirm the availability of items by just updating on Foaps alone. The changes will be then reflected across all food delivery platforms in no time.

Read More

In-depth reports

Identify the best performing fields, the areas that need attention, the potential areas of improvement and find productive insights to grow your business via our comprehensive, in-depth reports generated on the basis of your past order data.

Read More

Loved and believed by people beyond boundaries!

  • "Foaps has completely transformed how we manage our orders. We no longer miss any orders from Swiggy or Zomato. Everything is in one place and it's super easy to use."

    Geethu

    Haji Ali

  • "Managing orders from multiple platforms was a nightmare before Foaps. Now we handle everything from a single screen. Our efficiency has gone up significantly."

    Sathar

    Mallus Dhaba

  • "The menu management feature is a game changer. I update once and it reflects everywhere. Saved us so much time every day."

    Razeen

    Ceylone Bake House
